title: "Devotional Entry template"
description: "Canonical template for the Devotional Entry format."
---

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/generate_site_pages.py - do not edit by hand. Edit the source under taxonomy/ or examples/ and regenerate. -->

Canonical template for the [Devotional Entry](/writing-style-library/reference/formats/devotional-entry/) format.

```markdown
[Opening image or observation - 2-3 sentences]

[Scripture or anchor text - quoted directly]

[Reflection on the text - 2-4 paragraphs]

[Personal application - 1-2 paragraphs]

[Closing: a question, an image, or a simple invitation]

[Optional: closing prayer, 3-5 sentences]
```
